final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 工笔重彩 horizontal scroll painting of a 元宵灯会 panorama in 唐代长安城.

Style/medium: needs a 工笔重彩长卷 aesthetic — exact brushwork, pigment layering, and scroll proportion are yours
Composition: must be panoramic horizontal scroll (长卷) format
Subject: must include the 元宵灯会 scene with 万盏花灯 illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include 唐代长安城 as the setting
Lighting/mood: needs a lantern-lit night atmosphere with warm, luminous glow — exact light source arrangement is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, jewel-toned 重彩 direction — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional silk or paper scroll surface treatment — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
